title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Canadian CSA/SCC electrical safety, fire and installation, grid interconnection, TDG transport, and English/French information expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与加拿大 CSA/SCC 电气安全、消防和安装、并网、TDG 运输以及英法双语信息要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與加拿大 CSA/SCC 電氣安全、消防和安裝、併網、TDG 運輸以及英法雙語資訊要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, field evaluation, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, utility interconnection approval, building-permit approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current federal, provincial, territorial, utility, safety-code, transport, bilingual-labelling, and installation requirements with qualified Canadian professionals before shipment, sale, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、现场评估、危险货物分类、海关裁定、公用事业并网批准、建筑许可批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货、销售或投运前，应与合格的加拿大专业人士核验现行联邦、省/地区、公用事业、安全规范、运输、双语标签和安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、現場評估、危險品分類、海關裁定、公用事業併網批准、建築許可批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨、銷售或投運前，應與合格的加拿大專業人士核驗現行聯邦、省/地區、公用事業、安全規範、運輸、雙語標籤和安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For Canada, the main BESS gaps are SCC-accepted Canadian electrical certification, CSA/UL system and battery safety evidence, provincial fire/building and electrical-code installation approval, CSA C22.3 No. 9 utility interconnection, TDG/UN 38.3 transport documentation, and English/French labels and instructions.
answer_first.zh: 面向加拿大，BESS 的主要差距是 SCC 接受的加拿大电气认证、CSA/UL 系统及电池安全证据、省级消防/建筑和电气规范安装批准、CSA C22.3 No. 9 公用事业并网、TDG/UN 38.3 运输文件，以及英法双语标签和说明书。
answer_first.zht: 面向加拿大，BESS 的主要差距是 SCC 接受的加拿大電氣認證、CSA/UL 系統及電池安全證據、省級消防/建築和電氣規範安裝批准、CSA C22.3 No. 9 公用事業併網、TDG/UN 38.3 運輸文件，以及英法雙語標籤和說明書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, dangerous-goods authority, safety authority, or primary legal source preferred. SCC, CSA Group, Transport Canada, and official provincial or territorial sources are preferred for Canada-specific rows. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
